one_line: The unexplained science of sleep, dreams, and the sleeping brain — relatable to literally everyone. This sub-niche runs it through what-if scenarios.
audience: Audience already engaged with sleep & dreams content.
tone: What-If Scenarios — Poses a vivid hypothetical and answers it — one of the most reliable curiosity-gap formats because it promises a payoff in the first sentence.
hook_templates: What if {x} happened tomorrow? Here's what would actually happen.
What if {x}? Scientists ran the numbers.
This is what {x} would actually look like.
Nobody's ready for what happens if {x}.
